titleStmt.title: SII 6.928: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 928. (A.R. No. 297 of 1899). IN THE TWENTY-FIFTH NICHE OF THE SAME VERANDAH.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīśakahāyanē guṇadharābhānvaṁkkitē ka¨rkkaṭē saṁkrāntē mihirē sitē pratipadi śrīmannṛsiṁhāgrataḥ . nityākhaṁḍasadaṁḍadīpayugaḷasthityai dvayō¨rggōpa
yōḥ prādātbastaśataṁ praśastivijayaśrīkī¨rttipū¨rttyāptayē . 1 patmapāyakarāyasya tanayassunayassudhīḥ . śrīnāgumaṁḍalīkākhyaḥ kaḷi
ṁggadaḷamaṁḍanaḥ . 2 bhā¨ryyayā bhavyayā bhūriguṇayā māṁkamākhyayā nāyakyā saha saddha¨rmmavṛttaśīlakulāḍhyayā [. 3*]
svasti śrī . śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1213 gunēṁṭṭi śrīmadanantava¨rmma pratāpa vīra śrīnarasiṁhadēvarala prava¨rddhamāna vijayarājyasaṁvvatsaraṁbulu 15
gu śrāhi śukla prathamayu bṛhaspativāramunāṁṭi ka¨rkkāṭaka saṁkrāntiyaṁdu patmapāyakarāyani koḍku kaḷiṁgadaḷa nāgumahāma
ṁḍalīkuṁḍu Atidha¨rmmaśīlayagucunna tana bhā¨ryya māṁkamanāyakaṟālisahituṁḍai tamaku nāyurārōgyaiśva¨ryyā
bhivṛddhigā śrīnarasiṁhanādhuni sannidhiyaṁdu nityamunnu dīpadaṁḍusahitamaina reṁḍu Akhaṁḍadīpālu veluṁguṭaku vāribōyu koḍku pō
tubōyuvaśamuna Oka neṟadīpāna keṁbhaI goṟiyalunnu pallaAllāḍibōyuvaśamuna noka neṟadīpāna keṁbaI goṟiyaluṁggā reṁḍu Akha
ṁḍa dīpālakunnu nūṟu goṟiya lācaṁdrā¨rkasthāyiṁgāṁ beṭṭe nī dha¨rmmuvu śrīvaiṣṇavula rakṣa . śrī śrī śrī . 0 .
Digital edition of SII 6.928 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
